steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The student claims that some modern southwestern irrigation methods predate Lake Sabrina (1908). The supporting quotation must show a current irrigation method whose lineage goes back well before 1908.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice C describes the Hohokam people's irrigation system from the 7th century CE using engineering principles still utilized by today's engineers — directly tying a modern method to one that predates 1908 by over a millennium.

A focuses on a 20th-century method. B and D discuss modern importance but don't establish a pre-1908 lineage.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
